---
id: app-create
title: "Add a new app"
description: "Add a new app to Bitrise. This is the first step of the app registration process. To successfully set it up, you need to provide the required app parameters: the repository URL and the isPublic field. Read more about the app creation process in our [detailed guide](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/adding-and-managing-apps/#adding-a-new-app)."
sidebar_label: "Add a new app"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add a new app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/register"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add a new app to Bitrise. This is the first step of the app registration process. To successfully set it up, you need to provide the required app parameters: the repository URL and the isPublic field. Read more about the app creation process in our [detailed guide](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/adding-and-managing-apps/#adding-a-new-app).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
